archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Old Money Tech variant)
design_philosophy: Serious, professional, trust-inspiring visual design for a Brazilian law firm. Using high-contrast deep navy and elegant gold accents to convey authority and legacy, while maintaining high legibility for dense legal data.

components.button_primary: bg-[#0A192F] text-white hover:bg-[#112240] transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium shadow-sm
components.button_secondary: bg-[#C5A059] text-white hover:bg-[#D4AF37] transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium shadow-sm
components.card: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
components.input: border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-md px-3 py-2 w-full focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C5A059] focus:border-transparent outline-none text-text-primary
components.sidebar: bg-[#0A192F] text-slate-300 w-64 min-h-screen border-r border-[#112240] flex flex-col

login_background.description: Elegant law office desk with flags. Use with a dark blue overlay on the left side of the login page.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialization: Create the React app using standard .jsx and .js files (no TypeScript). Configure Tailwind CSS with the colors provided. Import Playfair Display and IBM Plex Sans from Google Fonts.

2. Component Strategy: Use Shadcn UI (converted to .js/.jsx) for tables, modals, dropdowns, and cards to maintain high accessibility and a professional look. Go cardless where possible or use subtle 1px borders with no extreme shadows.

3. Auth Flow: Create a Login screen split in half. Left: login_background image with a 60% deep navy (#0A192F) overlay. Right: Login form with Email, Senha (password), and an 'Entrar' button styled as button_secondary (gold).

4. Layout Wrapper: Build an Admin Layout with a Sidebar on the left. The Sidebar is deep navy (#0A192F) with links: Dashboard, Clientes, Processos, Agenda, Financeiro, Usuários. Active link MUST have gold text and a gold left border.

5. Dashboard Page: Implement a 4-column grid (Control Room grid) for KPI cards: Processos Ativos, Prazos Próximos, Total Clientes, Receita. Below KPIs, use Recharts for a clean bar chart showing monthly case load or revenue.
6. Clientes Page: CRUD view using a table. Columns: Nome, CPF/CNPJ, Contato, Ações. Include an 'Adicionar Cliente' button (primary blue).

7. Processos Page: Table listing cases. Columns: Nº CNJ, Tribunal, Vara, Cliente, Status. Make rows clickable to open a detail view. The detail view MUST support multiple PDF document uploads and a PDF viewer component.
8. Agenda Page: A calendar or list view displaying upcoming 'Prazos' (Deadlines) and 'Audiências' (Hearings).
9. Financeiro Page: Table tracking 'Honorários' (Fees) and 'Despesas' (Expenses). Use status badges: Pago (Green), Pendente (Yellow).
10. Usuários Page: Admin-only view to manage staff. Form to create users with roles: Advogado, Estagiário, Secretária.
11. Testing Requirements: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs) MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
12. Formatting: Ensure all text is in Brazilian Portuguese (PT-BR).
